providerAllocationInfo: A breakdown of the financial institutions that manage your ETFs (e.g., Vanguard, iShares).
fundDomicileInfo: The legal jurisdiction where your ETFs are registered (important for taxation).
fundSizeInfo: Total Assets Under Management (AUM) for each ETF in your portfolio (in millions).
fundAgeInfo: The number of years since each ETF was launched.
terRadarInfo: Visualize the Total Expense Ratio across your portfolio funds.
